title: 有馬記念の後に・誇りのウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I don't know what to say!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I am so devastated that merely standing here
brings me great pain, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please allow me to commend you...
Congratulations, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week takes a step toward me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was you who gave me the strength to make it to
the finish line on that final stretch...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for believing in me—for
supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week smiles, her face filled with pride.
